codes.BSIF: Based on BSI and IVF data
codes.QSA: Based on quarterly sector accounts data

codes.25A: 25th percentile of national annual growth rates
codes.75A: 75th percentile of national annual growth rates
codes.A10: Annual growth rates calculated on averaged monthly index series
codes.A20: Annual growth rates calculated on averaged quarterly index series
codes.F: Contribution to the M3 annual growth rate
codes.F10: Contribution to the M3 annual growth rate calculated on averaged monthly index series
codes.I10: Share of cross border activity versus total activity
codes.I11: Share of cross border activity with residents in the UK versus the euro area and the UK total activity
codes.I12: Share of cross border activity with residents in the UK versus the euro area and the UK total cross-border activity
codes.I20: Indicator of concentration of the national cross-border shares, based on the Herfindhal index
codes.I30: Indicator of neutrality in the distribution of cross-border activity
codes.I31: Indicator of neutrality in the distribution of cross-border activity, for countries sharing a land border
codes.I40: Indicator of concordance in the cross-border activity, based on the Kendall co-graduation index
codes.MAA: Maximum of national annual growth rates
codes.MIA: Minimum of national annual growth rates
codes.V: 3-month moving average of annual growth rate
codes.V00: 3-month moving average of index of notional stocks
codes.V10: 3-month moving average of growth rate to previous period
codes.V30: 3-month moving average of 3-month annualised growth rate
codes.V60: 3-month moving average of 6-month annualised growth rate
codes.W10: National proportion of M3 notional stock over the aggregated euro area countries M3 notional stocks
codes.WAA: Weighted average of national annual growth rates
